title: Hold On, We're Going Home - BBC Live Version
lyrics:
2 ContributorsHold On, We’re Going Home (BBC Live Version) Lyrics
I got my eyes on you
You're everything I see
I want your hot love and emotion
Endlessly
I can't get over you
You left your mark on me
I want your hot love and emotion
Endlessly

'Cause you're a good girl and you know it
You act so different around me
Yes, you're a good girl and you know it
I know exactly who you could be

Just hold on, we're going home
Just hold on, we're going home
It's hard to do these things alone
Just hold on, we're going home

I got my eyes on you
You're everything I see
I want your hot love and emotion
Endlessly
I can't get over you
You left your mark on me
I want your hot love and emotion
Endlessly

'Cause you're a good girl and you know it
You act so different around me
Yes, you're a good girl and you know it
I know exactly who you could be

Just hold on, we're going home
Just hold on, we're going home
It's hard to do these things alone
Just hold on, we're going home

You're the girl, you're the one
I give you everything I love
I think that's something, baby
I think that's something

Just hold on, we're going home
And just hold on, we're going home
It's hard to do these things alone
Just hold on, we're going home
Just hold on, we're going home
Just hold on, we're going home
It's hard to do these things alone
Just hold on, we're going home
